reviews.comment:
Carga de combustible: mínimo personal, trabajan a reglamento, no hay forma que se apuren, aunque tengan 15 vehículos en espera, ni hablar si llegás cerca de las 14 hs cuando cambian de turno...
Baños: limpieza a medias, hay un migitorio en reparación desde hace más de un año, el olor a orín es insoportable...
Full: una sola persona atendiendo, o sea..., podés esperar una eternidad por un café...
Soy socio ACA y me gustaría que el Club tome nota y vea cómo hacer para mejorar la atención a sus socios y público en general, así no van a tener más socios...
Aclaro que al menos una vez al año paso por aquí con mi familia desde hace más de 10 años.

(Translated by Google)
Fueling: minimal staff, they work to the rules, there's no way they're going to rush, even if they have 15 vehicles waiting, let alone if you arrive around 2:00 PM when they're changing shifts...
Restrooms: Half-cleaned, a urinal has been under repair for over a year, the smell of urine is unbearable...
Full: only one person serving, in other words... you can wait forever for a coffee...
I'm an ACA member and I'd like the Club to take note and figure out how to improve service to its members and the general public, so they won't have more members...
I should clarify that I've been here with my family at least once a year for over 10 years.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReTRfSlpREAE

reviews.comment:
Después de atravesar el camino del desierto tendría que estar mejor equipada la cafetería , queríamos desayunar y no tenían medialunas a las 9 de la mañana sólo cafés y galletitas del autoservicio , para el pueblo hay que entrar aprox 4 km

(Translated by Google)
After crossing the desert road, the cafeteria should be better equipped. We wanted to have breakfast and they didn't have croissants at 9 am, only coffee and self-service cookies. To get to the town, you have to go approximately 4 km in.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3am9fM1ZnEAE

reviews.comment:
muy bien ubicado. muy atentos los playeros. algo menos los encargados del serviclub. baños limpios y lugar donde parar un rato.

(Translated by Google)
Very well located. The beach attendants were very attentive. The service center staff were somewhat less so. Clean restrooms and a good place to stop for a while.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNGRibnNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, en la madrugada las veces que pase en los últimos meses cuatro veces, cierran las islas a las 06:00 y no abren hasta pasadas las 06:30 por cambio de turno en la tienda Full lo responsabilizan al concesionario por no dejarles café y no venden cierran las puertas, obligado a esperar por las distancias y dado que otra de las estaciones de YPF paso a Petrobras y soy cliente de YPF solamente

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, in the early morning, the four times I've been there in the last few months, they close the islands at 6:00 and don't open until after 6:30 due to a shift change at the Full store. They blame the dealer for not leaving them coffee and they don't sell it, they close the doors, forced to wait due to the distances and given that another of the YPF stations passed through Petrobras and I am only a YPF customer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReEtiZ2x3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio en la eess ... No tanto en el resto bar, les falta gente q atienda...no olvidar q paramos ahí "obligados" a llenar el tanque, tanto de ida como de vuelta....deberían poner más personal....encima, solo una caja...y no es de ahora, hace años q sucede lo mismo, más ahora q hay más turistas...sobre la ruta q une 25 de mayo a barda del medio UN DESASTRE...

(Translated by Google)
Good service at the gas station... Not so much at the restaurant/bar; they're short-staffed. Don't forget we were "forced" to stop there to fill up, both on the way there and back. They should hire more staff. Plus, there's only one register. And it's not a new problem; it's been going on for years, especially now with more tourists. The road connecting 25 de Mayo to Barda del Medio is a disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3c3RIbFJREAE

reviews.comment:
Nos quedamos a dormir y el olor a cloaca en la habitación fue insoportable y el restaurante caro

(Translated by Google)
We stayed overnight and the smell of sewage in the room was unbearable and the restaurant was expensive.
